    20→/**
    21→ * 视频下载服务 - 使用在线 API 解析视频
    22→ * 支持多平台：B站、抖音、YouTube、TikTok 等

    29→ * - 添加详细的日志输出
    30→ * - 支持Cookie认证（解决403问题）
    31→ */
    32→class VideoDownloadService(
    33→    private val bilibiliCookieProvider: (() -> String?)? = null,
    34→    private val youtubeCookieProvider: (() -> String?)? = null,
    35→    private val douyinCookieProvider: (() -> String?)? = null,
    36→    private val tiktokCookieProvider: (() -> String?)? = null
    37→) {

    39→    companion object {

    41→        private const val DEFAULT_TIMEOUT = 30_000L
    42→        private const val MAX_RETRIES = 3
    43→        private const val RETRY_DELAY_MS = 1000L
    44→
    45→        // API 健康检查缓存
    46→        private val apiHealthCache = ConcurrentHashMap<String, ApiHealthStatus>()
    47→        private const val HEALTH_CACHE_DURATION = 5 * 60 * 1000L // 5分钟
    48→
    49→        /**
    50→         * API 健康状态数据类
    51→         */
    52→        data class ApiHealthStatus(
    53→            val isAvailable: Boolean,
    54→            val responseTime: Long,
    55→            val lastCheckTime: Long,
    56→            val errorMessage: String? = null
    57→        )
    58→
    59→        /**
    60→         * 检查 API 健康状态
    61→         * @param apiUrl API 端点 URL
    62→         * @return 如果缓存有效且 API 可用返回 true，否则返回 true（默认可用，需实际检测）
    63→         */
    64→        fun isApiHealthy(apiUrl: String): Boolean {
    65→            val cached = apiHealthCache[apiUrl]
    66→            if (cached != null && System.currentTimeMillis() - cached.lastCheckTime < HEALTH_CACHE_DURATION) {
    67→                return cached.isAvailable
    68→            }
    69→            return true // 没有缓存时默认可用
    70→        }
    71→
    72→        /**
    73→         * 更新 API 健康状态
    74→         * @param apiUrl API 端点 URL
    75→         * @param isAvailable 是否可用
    76→         * @param responseTime 响应时间（毫秒）
    77→         * @param error 错误信息（可选）
    78→         */
    79→        fun updateApiHealth(apiUrl: String, isAvailable: Boolean, responseTime: Long = 0, error: String? = null) {
    80→            apiHealthCache[apiUrl] = ApiHealthStatus(isAvailable, responseTime, System.currentTimeMillis(), error)
    81→            Log.d(TAG, "API health updated: $apiUrl -> available=$isAvailable, responseTime=${responseTime}ms")
    82→        }
    83→
    84→        /**
    85→         * 获取最佳 API（按响应时间排序，优先使用最快的可用 API）
    86→         * @param apis API 配置列表
    87→         * @param getUrl 从配置中获取 URL 的函数
    88→         * @return 排序后的 API 列表
    89→         */
    90→        fun <T> getBestApi(apis: List<T>, getUrl: (T) -> String): List<T> {
    91→            return apis.sortedBy { api ->
    92→                val url = getUrl(api)
    93→                val status = apiHealthCache[url]
    94→                if (status == null) 0L else if (status.isAvailable) status.responseTime else Long.MAX_VALUE
    95→            }
    96→        }
    97→
    98→        /**
    99→         * 清除过期的健康检查缓存
   100→         */
   101→        fun clearExpiredHealthCache() {
   102→            val now = System.currentTimeMillis()
   103→            apiHealthCache.entries.removeIf { now - it.value.lastCheckTime > HEALTH_CACHE_DURATION }
   104→        }
   105→
   106→        /**
   107→         * 获取所有 API 的健康状态（用于调试）
   108→         */
   109→        fun getApiHealthStats(): Map<String, ApiHealthStatus> {
   110→            return apiHealthCache.toMap()
   111→        }
   112→    }

   133→            url.contains("youtube.com") || url.contains("youtu.be") -> youtubeCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
   134→            url.contains("douyin.com") || url.contains("iesdouyin.com") -> douyinCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true

   173→
   174→    /**
   175→     * 平台检测 - 参考 Electron 版本的 detectPlatform 函数
   176→     * 支持更多平台和短链接
   177→     */
   178→    fun detectPlatform(url: String): VideoPlatform {
   179→        val lowerUrl = url.lowercase()
   180→        return when {
   181→            // YouTube - 支持主域名和短链接
   182→            lowerUrl.contains("youtube.com") || lowerUrl.contains("youtu.be") -> VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE
   183→            // Bilibili - 支持主域名和 b23.tv 短链接
   184→            lowerUrl.contains("bilibili.com") || lowerUrl.contains("b23.tv") -> VideoPlatform.BILIBILI
   185→            // 抖音 - 支持多种域名
   186→            lowerUrl.contains("douyin.com") || lowerUrl.contains("iesdouyin.com") -> VideoPlatform.DOUYIN
   187→            // TikTok
   188→            lowerUrl.contains("tiktok.com") -> VideoPlatform.TIKTOK
   189→            // 微博
   190→            lowerUrl.contains("weibo.com") -> VideoPlatform.WEIBO
   191→            // 小红书
   192→            lowerUrl.contains("xiaohongshu.com") || lowerUrl.contains("xhslink.com") -> VideoPlatform.XIAOHONGSHU
   193→            // 微信视频号 - 只匹配视频号专用域名
   194→            lowerUrl.contains("channels.weixin.qq.com") -> VideoPlatform.WECHAT
   195→            // 直接视频链接
   196→            lowerUrl.contains(".mp4") || lowerUrl.contains(".m3u8") || lowerUrl.contains(".mpd") -> VideoPlatform.DIRECT
   197→            // 未知平台
   198→            else -> VideoPlatform.UNKNOWN
   199→        }
   200→    }
   201→
   202→    /**
   203→     * 获取视频下载链接 - 主入口函数
   204→     * 参考 Electron 版本的 extract-info IPC 处理
   205→     */
   206→    suspend fun getVideoInfo(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   207→        withTimeout(DEFAULT_TIMEOUT) {
   208→            try {
   209→                val cleanUrl = cleanUrl(url)
   210→                Log.d(TAG, "Processing URL: $cleanUrl")
   211→
   212→                val platform = detectPlatform(cleanUrl)
   213→                Log.d(TAG, "Detected platform: $platform")
   214→
   215→                when (platform) {
   216→                    VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE -> fetchYoutubeInfo(cleanUrl)
   217→                    VideoPlatform.BILIBILI -> fetchBilibiliInfo(cleanUrl)
   218→                    VideoPlatform.DOUYIN -> fetchDouyinInfo(cleanUrl)
   219→                    VideoPlatform.TIKTOK -> fetchTiktokInfo(cleanUrl)
   220→                    VideoPlatform.XIAOHONGSHU -> fetchXiaohongshuInfo(cleanUrl)
   221→                    VideoPlatform.WECHAT -> fetchWechatChannelsInfo(cleanUrl)
   222→                    VideoPlatform.DIRECT -> Result.success(
   223→                        VideoDownloadInfo(
   224→                            title = "直接视频链接",
   225→                            downloadUrl = cleanUrl,
   226→                            cover = null,
   227→                            duration = 0L,
   228→                            author = null,
   229→                            platform = VideoPlatform.DIRECT
   230→                        )
   231→                    )
   232→                    else -> Result.failure(
   233→                        Exception(
   234→                            "❌ 不支持的平台\n\n当前链接: $cleanUrl\n\n支持的平台:\n• YouTube (youtube.com, youtu.be)\n• B站 (bilibili.com, b23.tv)\n• 抖音 (douyin.com)\n• TikTok (tiktok.com)\n• 小红书 (xiaohongshu.com, xhslink.com)\n• 微信视频号 (channels.weixin.qq.com)\n\n建议: 请使用「导入本地视频」功能"
   235→                        )
   236→                    )
   237→                }
   238→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   239→                Log.e(TAG, "Error fetching video info", e)
   240→                Result.failure(e)
   241→            }
   242→        }
   243→    }
   244→
   245→    /**
   246→     * 清理 URL - 移除多余空格和无效字符
   247→     * 参考 Electron 版本的 cleanUrl 函数
   248→     */
   249→    private fun cleanUrl(url: String): String {
   250→        val trimmed = url.trim()
   251→        // 提取第一个有效的 HTTP/HTTPS 链接
   252→        val match = Regex("(https?://[^\\s\"'<>]+)").find(trimmed)
   253→        return match?.value ?: trimmed
   254→    }
   255→
   256→    /**
   257→     * 获取 YouTube 视频信息 - 改进版，使用 InnerTube API
   258→     * 基于 GitHub 研究：
   259→     * - ViMusic: https://github.com/vfsfitvnm/ViMusic (InnerTube 实现)
   260→     * - NewPipeExtractor: https://github.com/TeamNewPipe/NewPipeExtractor
   261→     */
   262→    private suspend fun fetchYoutubeInfo(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> {
   263→        Log.d(TAG, "Fetching YouTube info for: $url")
   264→
   265→        // 策略1: 尝试 NewPipeExtractor（推荐）
   266→        val newPipeResult = fetchYoutubeNewPipe(url)
   267→        if (newPipeResult.isSuccess) {
   268→            Log.d(TAG, "NewPipeExtractor success")
   269→            return newPipeResult
   270→        }
   271→        Log.w(TAG, "NewPipeExtractor failed: ${newPipeResult.exceptionOrNull()?.message}")
   272→
   273→        // 策略2: 尝试 InnerTube API（备用）
   274→        val innertubeResult = fetchYouTubeInnerTubeAPI(url)
   275→        if (innertubeResult.isSuccess) {
   276→            Log.d(TAG, "InnerTube API success")
   277→            return innertubeResult
   278→        }
   279→        Log.w(TAG, "InnerTube API failed: ${innertubeResult.exceptionOrNull()?.message}")
   280→
   281→        // 策略3: 尝试第三方API（最后备用）
   282→        return fetchYouTubeThirdPartyAPI(url)
   283→    }
   284→
   285→    /**
   286→     * 使用 NewPipeExtractor 解析 YouTube 视频
   287→     * 这是专门为 Android 设计的库，不依赖 YouTube API
   288→     */
   289→    private suspend fun fetchYoutubeNewPipe(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   290→        try {
   291→            val videoId = extractYoutubeVideoId(url)
   292→                ?: return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法提取 YouTube 视频 ID"))
   293→
   294→            Log.d(TAG, "Using NewPipeExtractor for YouTube: $videoId")
   295→
   296→            // 使用标准 YouTube URL 格式
   297→            val standardUrl = "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=$videoId"
   298→            val streamInfo = org.schabi.newpipe.extractor.stream.StreamInfo.getInfo(standardUrl)
   299→
   300→            // 获取最佳视频流
   301→            val videoStream = streamInfo.videoStreams
   302→                .filter { !it.isVideoOnly }
   303→                .maxByOrNull { it.getResolution()?.replace("p", "")?.toIntOrNull() ?: 0 }
   304→
   305→            // 获取最佳纯视频流（DASH）
   306→            val videoOnlyStream = streamInfo.videoOnlyStreams
   307→                .maxByOrNull { it.getResolution()?.replace("p", "")?.toIntOrNull() ?: 0 }
   308→
   309→            // 获取最佳音频流
   310→            val audioStream = streamInfo.audioStreams
   311→                .maxByOrNull { it.averageBitrate }
   312→
   313→            // 优先使用 DASH（视频+音频分离，画质更好）
   314→            val bestVideo = videoOnlyStream ?: videoStream
   315→            val bestAudio = if (videoOnlyStream != null) audioStream else null
   316→
   317→            if (bestVideo != null) {
   318→                Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   319→                    title = streamInfo.name ?: "YouTube 视频",
   320→                    downloadUrl = bestVideo.content ?: "",
   321→                    cover = streamInfo.thumbnails?.firstOrNull()?.url,
   322→                    duration = streamInfo.duration,
   323→                    author = streamInfo.uploaderName,
   324→                    platform = VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE,
   325→                    audioUrl = bestAudio?.content
   326→                ))
   327→            } else {
   328→                Result.failure(Exception("无法获取视频流"))
   329→            }
   330→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   331→            Log.e(TAG, "NewPipeExtractor error", e)
   332→            Result.failure(e)
   333→        }
   334→    }
   335→
   336→    /**
   337→     * 使用 YouTube InnerTube API 解析
   338→     * 使用 ANDROID 客户端身份请求 googleapis 端点
   339→     */
   340→    private suspend fun fetchYouTubeInnerTubeAPI(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   341→        try {
   342→            val videoId = extractYoutubeVideoId(url)
   343→            if (videoId == null) {
   344→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法提取视频ID"))
   345→            }
   346→            Log.d(TAG, "YouTube video ID: $videoId")
   347→
   348→            // InnerTube API 请求 - 使用 ANDROID 客户端
   349→            val requestBody = JSONObject().apply {
   350→                put("context", JSONObject().apply {
   351→                    put("client", JSONObject().apply {
   352→                        put("clientName", "ANDROID")
   353→                        put("clientVersion", "19.29.37")
   354→                        put("androidSdkVersion", 34)
   355→                        put("hl", "en")
   356→                        put("gl", "US")
   357→                        put("userAgent", "com.google.android.youtube/19.29.37 (Linux; U; Android 14) gzip")
   358→                    })
   359→                })
   360→                put("videoId", videoId)
   361→                put("contentCheckOk", true)
   362→                put("racyCheckOk", true)
   363→            }.toString()
   364→
   365→            // ANDROID 客户端使用 googleapis 端点
   366→            val request = Request.Builder()
   367→                .url("https://youtubei.googleapis.com/youtubei/v1/player?key=AIzaSyA8eiZmM1FaDVjRy-df2KTyQ_vz_yYM39w")
   368→                .header("Content-Type", "application/json")
   369→                .header("User-Agent", "com.google.android.youtube/19.29.37 (Linux; U; Android 14) gzip")
   370→                .header("X-YouTube-Client-Name", "3")
   371→                .header("X-YouTube-Client-Version", "19.29.37")
   372→                .post(requestBody.toRequestBody("application/json".toMediaType()))
   373→                .build()
   374→
   375→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   376→            val body = response.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   377→            val json = JSONObject(body)
   378→
   379→            // 检查播放状态
   380→            val playabilityStatus = json.optJSONObject("playabilityStatus")
   381→            val status = playabilityStatus?.optString("status")
   382→            if (status != "OK") {
   383→                val reason = playabilityStatus?.optString("reason") ?: "视频不可用"
   384→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("YouTube: $reason"))
   385→            }
   386→
   387→            val videoDetails = json.optJSONObject("videoDetails")
   388→            val title = videoDetails?.optString("title") ?: "YouTube视频"
   389→            val author = videoDetails?.optString("author") ?: ""
   390→            val lengthSeconds = videoDetails?.optLong("lengthSeconds") ?: 0L
   391→
   392→            val streamingData = json.optJSONObject("streamingData")
   393→
   394→            // 优先使用 adaptiveFormats（分离的音视频流，画质更好）
   395→            val adaptiveFormats = streamingData?.optJSONArray("adaptiveFormats")
   396→            var bestVideoUrl: String? = null
   397→            var bestAudioUrl: String? = null
   398→            var bestVideoBitrate = 0L
   399→            var bestAudioBitrate = 0L
   400→
   401→            if (adaptiveFormats != null) {
   402→                for (i in 0 until adaptiveFormats.length()) {
   403→                    val fmt = adaptiveFormats.getJSONObject(i)
   404→                    val mimeType = fmt.optString("mimeType", "")
   405→                    val fmtUrl = fmt.optString("url")
   406→                    val bitrate = fmt.optLong("bitrate", 0)
   407→
   408→                    if (fmtUrl.isEmpty()) continue // 跳过加密的流
   409→
   410→                    if (mimeType.startsWith("video/") && bitrate > bestVideoBitrate) {
   411→                        bestVideoBitrate = bitrate
   412→                        bestVideoUrl = fmtUrl
   413→                    } else if (mimeType.startsWith("audio/") && bitrate > bestAudioBitrate) {
   414→                        bestAudioBitrate = bitrate
   415→                        bestAudioUrl = fmtUrl
   416→                    }
   417→                }
   418→            }
   419→
   420→            // 如果 adaptiveFormats 没有可用的，回退到 formats（混合流）
   421→            if (bestVideoUrl == null) {
   422→                val formats = streamingData?.optJSONArray("formats")
   423→                if (formats != null && formats.length() > 0) {
   424→                    // 选择最高画质的混合流
   425→                    var bestBitrate = 0L
   426→                    for (i in 0 until formats.length()) {
   427→                        val fmt = formats.getJSONObject(i)
   428→                        val fmtUrl = fmt.optString("url")
   429→                        val bitrate = fmt.optLong("bitrate", 0)
   430→                        if (fmtUrl.isNotEmpty() && bitrate > bestBitrate) {
   431→                            bestBitrate = bitrate
   432→                            bestVideoUrl = fmtUrl
   433→                        }
   434→                    }
   435→                }
   436→            }
   437→
   438→            val thumbnails = videoDetails?.optJSONObject("thumbnail")?.optJSONArray("thumbnails")
   439→            val cover = thumbnails?.let {
   440→                if (it.length() > 0) it.getJSONObject(it.length() - 1).optString("url") else null
   441→            }
   442→
   443→            if (bestVideoUrl != null) {
   444→                return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   445→                    title = title,
   446→                    downloadUrl = bestVideoUrl,
   447→                    cover = cover,
   448→                    duration = lengthSeconds,
   449→                    author = author,
   450→                    platform = VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE,
   451→                    audioUrl = bestAudioUrl
   452→                ))
   453→            }
   454→
   455→            Result.failure(Exception("无法获取视频流（可能需要签名解密）"))
   456→
   457→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   458→            Log.e(TAG, "InnerTube API error", e)
   459→            Result.failure(e)
   460→        }
   461→    }

   463→    /**
   464→     * 使用第三方API解析（备用方案）
   465→     */
   466→    private suspend fun fetchYouTubeThirdPartyAPI(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> {
   467→        // 尝试多个第三方API
   468→        val apis = listOf(
   469→            YoutubeApiConfig("https://yt.lemnoslife.com/videosPart", "lemnoslife"),
   470→            YoutubeApiConfig("https://noembed.com/embed?url=$url", "noembed")
   471→        )
   472→
   473→        for (api in apis) {
   474→            try {
   475→                Log.d(TAG, "Trying YouTube API: ${api.name}")
   476→                val result = fetchYoutubeInfoWithApi(url, api)
   477→                if (result.isSuccess) {
   478→                    return result
   479→                }
   480→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   481→                Log.w(TAG, "YouTube API ${api.name} failed: ${e.message}")
   482→            }
   483→        }

   576→    /**
   577→     * 提取 B站视频标识（BV号或av号）
   578→     * 支持 BV 号、av 号和 b23.tv 短链接
   579→     */
   580→    private fun extractBVID(url: String): String? {
   581→        // 优先匹配 BV 号
   582→        val bvPattern = Regex("(BV[a-zA-Z0-9]{10})")
   583→        val bvMatch = bvPattern.find(url)
   584→        if (bvMatch != null) return bvMatch.groupValues[1]
   585→
   586→        // 匹配 av 号（转换为请求参数用）
   587→        val avPattern = Regex("av(\\d+)", RegexOption.IGNORE_CASE)
   588→        val avMatch = avPattern.find(url)
   589→        if (avMatch != null) return "av${avMatch.groupValues[1]}"
   590→
   591→        return null
   592→    }

   597→    private suspend fun resolveB23ShortLink(url: String): String? = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   598→        try {

   611→            val location = response.header("Location")
   612→            response.close()
   613→            location
   614→        } catch (e: Exception) {

   620→    /**
   621→     * 提取 YouTube 视频 ID
   622→     * 支持格式: watch?v=, youtu.be/, embed/, shorts/, v/, live/
   623→     */
   624→    private fun extractYoutubeVideoId(url: String): String? {
   625→        val patterns = listOf(
   626→            Regex("(?:youtube\\.com/watch\\?.*v=)([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})"),
   627→            Regex("youtu\\.be/([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})"),
   628→            Regex("youtube\\.com/embed/([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})"),
   629→            Regex("youtube\\.com/shorts/([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})"),
   630→            Regex("youtube\\.com/v/([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})"),
   631→            Regex("youtube\\.com/live/([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})")
   632→        )
   633→
   634→        for (pattern in patterns) {
   635→            val match = pattern.find(url)
   636→            if (match != null) {
   637→                return match.groupValues[1]
   638→            }
   639→        }
   640→        return null
   641→    }

   666→    /**
   667→     * 使用 B站官方 API 解析
   668→     * 参考 bilibili-api (Kotlin): https://github.com/czp3009/bilibili-api
   669→     *
   670→     * API 端点：
   671→     * - 视频信息: https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/view?bvid={bvid}
   672→     * - 播放地址: https://api.bilibili.com/x/player/playurl?bvid={bvid}&cid={cid}
   673→     */
   674→    private suspend fun fetchBilibiliOfficialAPI(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   675→        try {
   676→            // 1. 如果是 b23.tv 短链接，先解析真实 URL
   677→            var realUrl = url
   678→            if (url.contains("b23.tv")) {
   679→                val resolved = resolveB23ShortLink(url)
   680→                if (resolved != null) {
   681→                    realUrl = resolved
   682→                    Log.d(TAG, "Resolved b23.tv -> $realUrl")
   683→                } else {
   684→                    return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法解析b23.tv短链接"))
   685→                }
   686→            }
   687→
   688→            // 2. 提取视频标识（BV号或av号）
   689→            val videoId = extractBVID(realUrl)
   690→            if (videoId == null) {
   691→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法提取BV号或av号"))
   692→            }
   693→            Log.d(TAG, "Video ID: $videoId")
   694→
   695→            // 获取Cookie（如果有配置）
   696→            val cookie = getCookieForPlatform(url)
   697→            if (cookie != null) {
   698→                Log.d(TAG, "Using configured cookies for Bilibili API")
   699→            }
   700→
   701→            // 3. 获取视频信息（获取 cid）- 支持 BV 号和 av 号
   702→            val infoUrl = if (videoId.startsWith("av")) {
   703→                "https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/view?aid=${videoId.removePrefix("av")}"
   704→            } else {
   705→                "https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/view?bvid=$videoId"
   706→            }
   707→            val infoRequestBuilder = Request.Builder()
   708→                .url(infoUrl)
   709→                .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   710→                .header("Referer", "https://www.bilibili.com/")
   711→
   712→            // 添加Cookie
   713→            if (cookie != null) {
   714→                infoRequestBuilder.header("Cookie", cookie)
   715→            }
   716→
   717→            val infoRequest = infoRequestBuilder.build()
   718→
   719→            val infoResponse = client.newCall(infoRequest).execute()
   720→            val infoBody = infoResponse.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   721→            val infoJson = JSONObject(infoBody)
   722→
   723→            if (infoJson.optInt("code", -1) != 0) {
   724→                val errorMsg = infoJson.optString("message")
   725→                // 检查是否是需要Cookie的错误
   726→                if (errorMsg.contains("登录") || errorMsg.contains("会员") || errorMsg.contains("权限")) {
   727→                    return@withContext Result.failure(
   728→                        Exception("❌ 需要登录或会员权限\n\n错误信息: $errorMsg\n\n解决方案：\n• 在设置中配置B站Cookie（SESSDATA）\n• 或使用「导入本地视频」功能")
   729→                    )
   730→                }
   731→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API错误: $errorMsg"))
   732→            }
   733→
   734→            val data = infoJson.getJSONObject("data")
   735→            val cid = data.optLong("cid")
   736→            val title = data.optString("title")
   737→            val cover = data.optString("pic").replace("\\/\\\\/", "/")
   738→            val duration = data.optInt("duration")
   739→            val author = data.optJSONObject("owner")?.optString("name") ?: "未知UP主"
   740→
   741→            Log.d(TAG, "Video info: $title, cid=$cid")
   742→
   743→            // 4. 获取播放URL - 使用DASH格式（fnval=4048支持全部格式）
   744→            val bvParam = if (videoId.startsWith("av")) "avid=${videoId.removePrefix("av")}" else "bvid=$videoId"
   745→            val playUrl = "https://api.bilibili.com/x/player/playurl?$bvParam&cid=$cid&qn=116&fnval=4048&fnver=0&fourk=1"
   746→            val playRequestBuilder = Request.Builder()
   747→                .url(playUrl)
   748→                .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   749→                .header("Referer", "https://www.bilibili.com/")
   750→
   751→            if (cookie != null) {
   752→                playRequestBuilder.header("Cookie", cookie)
   753→            }
   754→
   755→            val playRequest = playRequestBuilder.build()
   756→            val playResponse = client.newCall(playRequest).execute()
   757→            val playBody = playResponse.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   758→            val playJson = JSONObject(playBody)
   759→
   760→            if (playJson.optInt("code", -1) != 0) {
   761→                val errorMsg = playJson.optString("message")
   762→                if (errorMsg.contains("登录") || errorMsg.contains("会员") || errorMsg.contains("权限")) {
   763→                    return@withContext Result.failure(
   764→                        Exception("❌ 需要登录或会员权限\n\n错误信息: $errorMsg\n\n解决方案：\n• 在设置中配置B站Cookie（SESSDATA）\n• 或使用「导入本地视频」功能")
   765→                    )
   766→                }
   767→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("获取播放URL失败: $errorMsg"))
   768→            }
   769→
   770→            val playData = playJson.getJSONObject("data")
   771→            val dash = playData.optJSONObject("dash")
   772→            val durl = playData.optJSONArray("durl")
   773→
   774→            var videoUrl: String? = null
   775→            var audioUrl: String? = null
   776→
   777→            if (durl != null && durl.length() > 0) {
   778→                // MP4格式（包含音视频）
   779→                videoUrl = durl.getJSONObject(0).optString("url")
   780→            } else if (dash != null) {
   781→                // DASH格式 - 选择最佳画质的视频流
   782→                val dashVideo = dash.optJSONArray("video")
   783→                val dashAudio = dash.optJSONArray("audio")
   784→
   785→                if (dashVideo != null && dashVideo.length() > 0) {
   786→                    // 按bandwidth降序选择最佳画质（优先选择高码率）
   787→                    var bestBandwidth = 0L
   788→                    for (i in 0 until dashVideo.length()) {
   789→                        val v = dashVideo.getJSONObject(i)
   790→                        val bw = v.optLong("bandwidth", 0)
   791→                        if (bw > bestBandwidth) {
   792→                            bestBandwidth = bw
   793→                            videoUrl = v.optString("baseUrl").takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }
   794→                                ?: v.optString("base_url")
   795→                        }
   796→                    }
   797→                    // 选择最佳音频质量
   798→                    if (dashAudio != null && dashAudio.length() > 0) {
   799→                        var bestAudioBw = 0L
   800→                        for (i in 0 until dashAudio.length()) {
   801→                            val a = dashAudio.getJSONObject(i)
   802→                            val bw = a.optLong("bandwidth", 0)
   803→                            if (bw > bestAudioBw) {
   804→                                bestAudioBw = bw
   805→                                audioUrl = a.optString("baseUrl").takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }
   806→                                    ?: a.optString("base_url")
   807→                            }
   808→                        }
   809→                    }
   810→                    Log.d(TAG, "DASH format: best video bandwidth=$bestBandwidth, hasAudio=${audioUrl != null}")
   811→                }
   812→            }
   813→
   814→            if (videoUrl != null) {
   815→                Log.d(TAG, "Got video URL from official API, cookies used: ${cookie != null}, hasAudio: ${audioUrl != null}")
   816→                return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   817→                    title = title,
   818→                    downloadUrl = videoUrl,
   819→                    cover = cover,
   820→                    duration = duration.toLong(),
   821→                    author = author,
   822→                    cookies = cookie,
   823→                    platform = VideoPlatform.BILIBILI,
   824→                    audioUrl = audioUrl
   825→                ))
   826→            }
   827→
   828→            Result.failure(Exception("无法获取播放地址"))
   829→
   830→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   831→            Log.e(TAG, "Official API error", e)
   832→            Result.failure(e)
   833→        }
   834→    }

   891→    private suspend fun fetchBilibiliInfoWithApi(api: BilibiliApiConfig): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   892→        // 健康检查：跳过已知不可用的 API
   893→        if (!isApiHealthy(api.endpoint)) {
   894→            Log.w(TAG, "[${api.name}] API is marked as unhealthy, skipping")
   895→            return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API暂时不可用"))
   896→        }
   897→
   898→        val startTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   899→        try {
   900→            val request = Request.Builder()
   901→                .url(api.endpoint)
   902→                .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   903→                .header("Referer", "https://www.bilibili.com/")
   904→                .build()
   905→
   906→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   907→            val responseTime = System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime
   908→            val responseBody = response.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   909→
   910→            Log.d(TAG, "[${api.name}] Response: ${responseBody.take(300)}")
   911→
   912→            // 检查是否是HTML响应（API可能失效）
   913→            if (responseBody.trim().startsWith("<!DOCTYPE") || responseBody.trim().startsWith("<html")) {
   914→                Log.w(TAG, "[${api.name}] API returned HTML, may be invalid")
   915→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API返回HTML，可能已失效"))
   916→            }
   917→
   918→            val json = JSONObject(responseBody)
   919→
   920→            // 尝试多种返回格式解析
   921→
   922→            // 格式1: {data: {url: "...", title: "..."}}
   923→            if (json.has("data")) {
   924→                val data = json.getJSONObject("data")
   925→                val videoUrl = data.optJSONArray("url")?.optString(0)
   926→                    ?: data.optString("url")
   927→                    ?: data.optString("video_url")
   928→                    ?: data.optString("playurl")
   929→                    ?: data.optString("download_url")
   930→
   931→                val title = data.optString("title")
   932→                    ?: data.optString("name")
   933→                    ?: "B站视频"
   934→
   935→                if (videoUrl.isNotEmpty() && videoUrl.startsWith("http")) {
   936→                    Log.d(TAG, "[${api.name}] Got video URL: $videoUrl")
   937→                    updateApiHealth(api.endpoint, true, responseTime)
   938→                    return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   939→                        title = title,
   940→                        downloadUrl = videoUrl,
   941→                        cover = data.optString("pic")
   942→                            ?: data.optString("cover")
   943→                            ?: data.optString("img"),
   944→                        duration = data.optLong("duration", 0L) / 1000,
   945→                        author = data.optString("author")
   946→                            ?: data.optString("uploader")
   947→                            ?: data.optString("owner")?.let { ownerJson ->
   948→                                try { JSONObject(ownerJson).optString("name") } catch(e: Exception) { null }
   949→                            }
   950→                    ))
   951→                }
   952→            }
   953→
   954→            // 格式2: {url: "...", title: "..."}
   955→            val directUrl = json.optString("url")
   956→                ?: json.optString("video_url")
   957→                ?: json.optString("playurl")
   958→                ?: json.optString("download_url")
   959→
   960→            if (directUrl.startsWith("http")) {
   961→                val title = json.optString("title") ?: "B站视频"

  1086→            // 检查是否是HTML
  1087→            if (responseBody.trim().startsWith("<!DOCTYPE") || responseBody.trim().startsWith("<html")) {
  1088→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API返回HTML，可能已失效"))

  1090→
  1091→            val json = JSONObject(responseBody)
  1092→

  1113→                    ?: videoData.optString("video_url")
  1114→                    ?: videoData.optString("download_addr")

  1121→                if (videoUrl.isNotEmpty() && (videoUrl.startsWith("http") || videoUrl.startsWith("//"))) {

  1123→                    val finalUrl = if (videoUrl.startsWith("//")) "https:$videoUrl" else videoUrl
  1124→

  1127→                        ?: data.optString("author")
  1128→                        ?: data.optString("nickname")

  1130→                    val cover = data.optString("cover")

  1136→                    return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(

  1146→            // 格式2: {url: "...", title: "...", author: "..."}

  1427→    private suspend fun fetchWechatChannelsInfo(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> {
  1428→        Log.d(TAG, "Fetching WeChat Channels info for: $url")
  1429→
  1430→        // 尝试多个第三方 API

  1437→        for ((index, api) in apis.withIndex()) {

  1466→
  1467→    /**
  1468→     * 使用指定 API 获取微信视频号信息

  1470→    private suspend fun fetchWechatChannelsInfoWithApi(api: WechatApiConfig): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
  1471→        try {
  1472→            val request = Request.Builder()
  1473→                .url(api.endpoint)
  1474→                .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
  1475→                .header("Referer", "https://channels.weixin.qq.com/")
  1476→                .build()
  1477→
  1478→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
  1479→            val responseBody = response.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
  1480→
  1481→            Log.d(TAG, "[${api.name}] Response: ${responseBody.take(300)}")
  1482→
  1483→            // 检查是否是HTML
  1484→            if (responseBody.trim().startsWith("<!DOCTYPE") || responseBody.trim().startsWith("<html")) {

  1488→            val json = JSONObject(responseBody)

  1511→                    ?: "微信视频号"

  1513→                if (videoUrl.isNotEmpty() && videoUrl.startsWith("http")) {

  1516→                        downloadUrl = videoUrl,
  1517→                        cover = data.optString("cover")
  1518→                            ?: data.optString("thumb")
  1519→                            ?: data.optString("thumbnail"),
  1520→                        duration = data.optLong("duration", 0L),
  1521→                        author = data.optString("author")

  1523→                            ?: data.optString("username"),
  1524→                        platform = VideoPlatform.WECHAT

  1526→                }

  1528→
  1529→            // 直接格式

  1534→            if (directUrl.startsWith("http")) {

  1536→                    title = json.optString("title") ?: json.optString("desc") ?: "微信视频号",
  1537→                    downloadUrl = directUrl,
  1538→                    cover = json.optString("cover") ?: json.optString("thumb"),
  1539→                    duration = json.optLong("duration", 0L),
  1540→                    author = json.optString("author") ?: json.optString("nickname"),
  1541→                    platform = VideoPlatform.WECHAT
  1542→                ))
  1543→            }
  1544→
  1545→            Result.failure(Exception("无法从API响应中提取视频链接"))
  1546→
  1547→        } catch (e: Exception) {
  1548→            Log.e(TAG, "[${api.name}] Request failed", e)
  1549→            Result.failure(e)

  1551→    }
